nasb.text: Not that anyone has seen the Father, except the One who is from God; He has seen the Father.

esv.text: not that anyone has seen the Father except he who is from God; he has seen the Father.

cnv.text: 這不是說有人見過父；只有從　神那裡來的那一位，他才見過父。

ccb.text: 这并不是说有人见过父，唯独从上帝而来的那位见过父。

csbs.text: 这并不是说，有谁看到父；只有从神而来的那一位，他才看到父。
